title: Action Creation (Web UI) — Process Flow
content: flowchart TD
start([START: User opens create action form in Web UI])

s1[1. Select workflow definition
GET /api/v1/admin/workflows?status=published]

s2[2. Fill in required fields
title, description, priority,
action_type, assigned_to, site_id]

s3[3. Submit form
POST /api/v1/actions
Authorization: Bearer JWT
tenant derived from claims]
s4[4. Lookup compliance profile by action_type]

d1{Compliance profile found
for this action type?}

s5a[5a. Apply guards and deadlines
from compliance profile
Attach guard conditions to workflow transitions
Create regulatory deadline entries]

s5b[5b. Continue without compliance profile
No guards, no regulatory deadlines]

s6[6. Generate action number via TenantSequence
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SELECT FOR UPDATE on actions.tenant_sequences
WHERE tenant_id = tenant
Increment sequence counter
Format: ACT-counter padded to 4+ digits
COMMIT]

s7[7. Set initial state from workflow definition
Resolve the workflow's start state]

s8[8. Create regulatory deadlines per compliance profile
INSERT actions.regulatory_deadlines for each deadline rule
due_date = creation date + profile interval]

s9[9. Record ActionStateHistory entry - initial state
INSERT actions.action_state_history
action_id, from_state=NULL, to_state=initial_state,
changed_by=user_id]

s10[10. Record ActionAuditEvent - creation
INSERT actions.action_audit_events
action_id, event_type='action.created',
actor_id=user_id, details]

s11[11. Return 201 Created with action DTO + ETag
action_id, action_number, state,
workflow, deadlines
ETag header derived from row version]
stop([END])
d1 -->|Yes| s5a
d1 -->|No| s5b
